hooks.command: grep -Eq '(^|[^[:alnum:]_])git[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]].*[[:space:]]+)?commit([^[:alnum:]_]|$)' || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; git -C "$root" diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qxE 'PLAN\.md|ACTION_LOG\.md' && exit 0; echo 'Commit blocked: update PLAN.md (tick the task; append to ACTION_LOG.md as needed) and stage it before committing.' >&2; exit 2
hooks.statusMessage: Checking PLAN.md/ACTION_LOG.md is current before commit
